children.text:
WHO GIVES YOU THE 
MOST FACEBOOK LIKES
Login with facebook and see more
Unlock bonus - Get location log every 15 minutes
Records older than 2 weeks are automatically deleted.

How to connect with
your partner's phone?
1. Ask your partner to install Couple Tracker on his/her phone
To connect with your partner's phone BOTH OF YOU MUST HAVE Couple Tracker installed. The app can't be hidden and can't be tracking only one of you. (You can combine and connect Free and PRO versions)
Ask your partner to open Couple Tracker and send you his/her user ID. Enter your partner's user ID in the form above and send the request.
3. Connection request was sent. Ask your partner to accept the request.
Ask your partner to open Couple Tracker and accept the connection request
4. You have a new connection request
Request was send by user with phone number: ****756 and Couple Tracker user/account ID: 15354566.
Click to disconnect from your partner's phone
Extend app features to show more records
Suggest new features, send us your feedback or ask questions
and give us best thank that developer could get ;)
To share/monitor you and your and partner's FB both of you have to allow Facebook sharing
